$comment: E2E suite config. The harness runs every workflow graph discovered in sourceDir against the e2e-server, which fakes all providers (LLM + external/media nodes return type-correct placeholder outputs). prepareSuite.ts reads each template's embedded params; add per-id overrides below when a template needs specific inputs. ids are slugified from the filename (e.g. 'Album Cover Creator' -> 'album-cover-creator').
